phrases.intent_en: Where is the Baixa-Chiado metro link?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a ligação para o metro Baixa-Chiado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH lee-guh-SOWN PUH-ruh AW MEHT-roo BEYE-shuh-SHEEAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Intermodal transfers in Lisbon require validating separate transport tickets.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a ligação ao metro dentro da estação.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH lee-guh-SOWN OW MEHT-roo DAYNGT-roo DUH shtuh-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the metro link within the station.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the metro link within the station.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH lee-guh-SOWN OW MEHT-roo DAYNGT-roo DUH shtuh-SOWN.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a ligação ao metro dentro da estação.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the platform snack kiosk?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque de lanches da plataforma?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH LAHNNG-shihsh DUH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh?
phrases.cultural_note: Platform kiosks in Portuguese stations offer quick pastries and coffee.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um fiscal de bilhetes na plataforma.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG feesh-KAHL DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh NUH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a ticket inspector on the platform.

responses.english: Ask a ticket inspector on the platform.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG feesh-KAHL DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh NUH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh.
responses.french: Pergunte a um fiscal de bilhetes na plataforma.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the platform snack kiosk?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque de snacks nas plataformas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH ZNAHKSH NUHSH pluh-tuh-FOH-ruh-muhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The snack kiosk is located on the platforms serving the Sintra line, a stable fact.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar bilhetes de comboio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR bee-LYEH-tihsh DIH koom-BOYOO?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a bilheteira CP no átrio principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh seh-PEH NOO AHTR-yoo preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the CP ticket office in the main hall.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the CP ticket office in the main hall.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh seh-PEH NOO AHTR-yoo preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a bilheteira CP no átrio principal.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o átrio principal dos bilhetes?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW AHTR-yoo preen-see-PAHL DOOSH bee-LYEH-tihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Rossio's historic horseshoe arch and clock tower serve as primary orientation points.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica sob o relógio central.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh SOHB AW reh-LAWZH-yoo sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is located under the central clock.

responses.english: Good morning, it is located under the central clock.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh SOHB AW reh-LAWZH-yoo sayngt-RAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica sob o relógio central.

phrases.intent_en: Where are the Sintra line platforms?
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as plataformas dos comboios de Sintra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH pluh-tuh-FOH-ruh-muhsh DOOSH koom-BOYOOSH DIH SEENT-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Sintra line trains depart from lower-level platforms accessed by pedestrian tunnels.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as plataformas da linha de Sintra.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH pluh-tuh-FOH-ruh-muhsh DUH LEE-nyuh DIH SEENT-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the Sintra line platforms.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the Sintra line platforms.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH pluh-tuh-FOH-ruh-muhsh DUH LEE-nyuh DIH SEENT-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para as plataformas da linha de Sintra.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the staffed ticket window?
phrases.text_local: Onde está a bilheteira com funcionário?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh KOHM foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Staffed windows in CP stations operate on a first-come, first-served basis.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a bilheteira CP.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh seh-PEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the CP ticket office.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the CP ticket office.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh seh-PEH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a bilheteira CP.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Baixa-Chiado metro link?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a ligação ao metro Baixa-Chiado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH lee-guh-SOWN OW MEHT-roo BEYE-shuh-SHEEAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: The Baixa-Chiado metro station is directly connected to Rossio Station, so the answer points to the station itself.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o metro Baixa-Chiado.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW MEHT-roo BEYE-shuh-SHEEAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the Baixa-Chiado metro.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the Baixa-Chiado metro.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW MEHT-roo BEYE-shuh-SHEEAH-doo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o metro Baixa-Chiado.

phrases.intent_en: Where are the Sintra line platforms?
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as plataformas da linha de Sintra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH pluh-tuh-FOH-ruh-muhsh DUH LEE-nyuh DIH SEENT-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese transport staff prioritize direct, efficient navigation guidance.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a linha de Sintra.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH LEE-nyuh DIH SEENT-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the Sintra line.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the Sintra line.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH LEE-nyuh DIH SEENT-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a linha de Sintra.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the CP customer service desk?
phrases.text_local: Onde se situa o balcão de atendimento da CP?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH see-TOOUH AW bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too DUH seh-PEH?
phrases.cultural_note: Customer service desks handle refunds and route inquiries during operating hours.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o balcão de atendimento da CP.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too DUH seh-PEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the CP customer service desk.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the CP customer service desk.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too DUH seh-PEH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o balcão de atendimento da CP.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Baixa-Chiado metro link?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o acesso ao metro da Baixa-Chiado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW uh-SEH-soo OW MEHT-roo DUH BEYE-shuh-SHEEAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Metro connections in Lisbon stations are clearly signed but staff confirm quickly.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o metro da Baixa-Chiado.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW MEHT-roo DUH BEYE-shuh-SHEEAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the Baixa-Chiado metro.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the Baixa-Chiado metro.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW MEHT-roo DUH BEYE-shuh-SHEEAH-doo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o metro da Baixa-Chiado.

phrases.intent_en: Where are the CP ticket machines?
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as máquinas de bilhetes da CP?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh DUH seh-PEH?
phrases.cultural_note: In Lisbon's Rossio station, the ticket machines are typically near the ticket hall entrance; asking clearly helps avoid confusion.

likely_response.translation_en: In the main hall, on the left.

responses.english: In the main hall, on the left.
